title: HGL GAMES CONTROLLER SENSORY MAZE
features: It's a tactile adventure. Get ready to embark on a hands-on journey as you use your dexterity and skills to navigate through the maze.
By applying gentle pressure and squeezing and squishing your way to the end.
Push the sparling glitter from one end to the other
Engaging, absorbing, fascinating and engrossing. Make a great fidget toy
Made of a soft vinyl that feels great in your hand. Non-toxic and child safe. Meets and exceeds all UK, EU and US product testing requirements.
description: Product Description Sensory maze game that features a game-controller theme. Get ready to embark on a tactile journey as you use your hands to navigate through the maze. By applying gentle pressure and squeezing and squishing your way to the end. Unleash the magic of play with Tobar / HGL Toys, where imagination knows no bounds and adventure awaits around every corner. Tobar has been a trusted name in the world of toys, captivating hearts and minds with an extraordinary range of playthings that promise joy, creativity, and wonder for children of all ages. Toys that have stood the test of time and built to last through countless hours of entertainment. From classic retro to cutting-edge innovation there’s a Tobar toy for every age, interest and desire. All designed to ignite the flames of imagination. With their captivating designs, vivid colors, and unique features, they transport children to a world of endless possibilities, where creativity knows no bounds. Not just for play; they're also tools for learning, Tobar encourages curious minds to explore and discover the wonders of the world. Tobar believes in the power of play to bring families together. Their games and activities are perfect for creating memorable bonding moments, making every day a new adventure. Discover the enchanting world of Tobar, where joy, laughter, and exploration are at the forefront. Tobar empowers you to find the perfect toy to nurture the creativity, curiosity, and playfulness in your child. Elevate playtime to a whole new level and experience the magic of extraordinary toys. For almost 50 years we have offered high-quality, innovative and safe products that engage and enthrall children and adults alike. We strive to promote creativity, discovery, entertainment and imagination with products designed to delight and engineered to endure. From Impulse to Games, Plush to Outdoor, Figurines to Playsets. Along with Tobar products, One For Fun offers HGL toys, OzBozz Ride-ons and Bburago Race Cars and Maisto Collectible Diecast.
